{{Quote|I do not need my safety guarded. I do not know how you humans do such things, but Chiss leaders do not merely sit behind the young warriors and watch them fight.|Drask|<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />}}
'''Prard'ras'kleoni''', otherwise known by his [[Core name/Legends|core name]] of '''Drask''', was a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Chiss Defense Fleet]], who served as the military counterpart to [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]] on the mission to repatriate the survivors of [[Outbound Flight Project|Outbound Flight]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. Although initially cool to the Human delegates of the [[Empire of the Hand]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], and in particular [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Chak Fel]] earned his respect as they fought together against the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]]. He wore dusky red facings on his black [[Chiss officer's long tunic|uniform]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

Following the [[Battle of the Redoubt]], he led the Chiss attack on the Vagaari.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
